description_long: This is a single, vibrant red rose with a long, slender green stem and several green leaves attached at intervals along the stem. The rose bloom is composed of tightly layered petals, forming a classic, rounded shape with a slightly ruffled edge. The petals are arranged in a spiral whorl, overlapping each other and creating a dense, lush appearance. The leaves are ovate with pointed tips and visible veins, attached alternately along the stem. The stem is straight and smooth, with a subtle sheen, and appears to lack visible thorns. This flower would be commonly found in urban parks, gardens, or as part of decorative landscaping.
description: A single red rose with a lush, spirally layered bloom and a long green stem with ovate leaves. The petals are densely packed, creating a classic, elegant floral appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rose bloom in full, with two leaves visible on the left side of the stem.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded bloom and a cluster of leaves on the right, with the stem slightly curving.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the rose bloom and a prominent leaf extending to the right.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the bloom from the left, with a single leaf curving downward and another leaf visible lower on the stem.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a spiral whorl, overlapping densely in multiple layers, creating a rounded, symmetrical bloom typical of hybrid tea roses.
